title: Battered De and Fishito Fritters
description: A simple and crispy fritter recipe made with de and fishito. Perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the flour, egg, salt, and pepper.
Add the de, solo, and fishito to the bowl and mix well.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the mixture into the oil.
Fry the fritters until they are golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fritters on paper towels.
Serve the fritters hot and enjoy!
